hero.headline: When it needs fixing, *Don gets it done*
hero.subheadline: Door won't fit? Frame needs rebuilding? Deck repair on a historic home? We handle the tricky stuff other guys walk away from.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Fix It Right the First Time
services_section.subheading: From precision door installations to deck repairs on historic homes

services.title: Door Installation & Repair
services.description: New doors, frame rebuilds, threshold replacements. When the door doesn't fit, we make it work perfectly.

services.title: Wood Repair & Restoration
services.description: Rotten sills, damaged frames, window trim. We cut out the bad wood and rebuild it stronger than before.

services.title: Deck Repair & Maintenance
services.description: Historic home decks, structural repairs, weatherproofing. Meticulous craftsmanship that lasts decades.

services.title: General Home Repairs
services.description: The odd jobs, the tricky fixes, the stuff that needs an experienced eye. We tackle what others can't.

about.heading: Don Knows Columbus Homes
about.body: Every house tells a story, and Don's heard them all. From historic districts to new builds across Columbus, he brings the knowledge and skill to handle whatever your home throws at him. When other contractors say it can't be done, Don figures out how to make it work.

reviews.name: Michelle S.
reviews.text: Don rebuilt our entire door frame when the new door wouldn't fit. True artistry - got it done in just 3-4 hours!

reviews.name: Dylan P.
reviews.text: Highly knowledgeable craftsman who meticulously repaired my historic home's deck. He's straight up and tells you exactly what he can do.

reviews.name: Sierra F.
reviews.text: Timely response, came out within days for door threshold work. Seamless job plus great tips for aftercare.

reviews.name: Aimee S.
reviews.text: Repaired rotten wood around our window frame quickly and excellently. Definitely calling him for future projects.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Columbus & Surrounding Areas
service_areas.subheading: Quality home improvement throughout Central Ohio

cta.heading: Ready to Fix What's Broken?
cta.body: Don't let that problem get worse. Call Don today for straight talk and skilled work that gets it done right.
